virtualTable.name: vw_konum
virtualTable.sql: WITH RECURSIVE ana AS ( SELECT a.geom FROM tbl_location_analysis a WHERE a.id = %aid% AND a.is_deleted = false AND a.is_active = true ), crit AS ( SELECT c.category_id, c.weight FROM tbl_location_analysis_criterion c WHERE c.analysis_id = %aid% AND c.is_deleted = false AND c.is_active = true ), cat_up AS ( SELECT c.id AS category_id, c.id AS ancestor_id, c.parent_id AS next_parent, 0 AS dist FROM tbl_poi_category c WHERE c.is_deleted = false AND c.is_active = true UNION ALL SELECT u.category_id, p.id, p.parent_id, u.dist + 1 FROM cat_up u JOIN tbl_poi_category p ON p.id = u.next_parent AND p.is_deleted = false AND p.is_active = true WHERE u.dist < 20 ), matched AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (p.id) p.id, p.geom, cr.weight FROM tbl_poi p JOIN ana ON ST_Intersects(p.geom, ana.geom) JOIN cat_up u ON u.category_id = p.category_id JOIN crit cr ON cr.category_id = u.ancestor_id WHERE p.is_deleted = false AND p.is_active = true ORDER BY p.id, u.dist ASC ) SELECT id, geom::geometry(Point,4326) AS geom, weight::float8 AS weight FROM matched
